This move, without formal recognition, aims to enhance regional stability and counter terrorism. Muttaqi also strongly condemned Pakistan's alleged bombing of civilian areas in Afghanistan, highlighting a growing rift between Kabul and Islamabad.]]></description><link>https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/india/balancing-islamabad-why-indias-kabul-outreach-matters-now-the-afghan-comeback-explained/articleshow/124482931.cms</link><guid>https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/india/balancing-islamabad-why-indias-kabul-outreach-matters-now-the-afghan-comeback-explained/articleshow/124482931.cms</guid><pubDate>Sat, 11 Oct 2025 21:10:56 +0530</pubDate><dc:creator>AYUSH PANDEY</dc:creator><enclosure type="image/jpeg" length="36624" url="https://static.toiimg.com/photo/msid-124482977,imgsize-36624.cms"/></item><item><title>US school campus shooting: 4 dead, 12 injured in Mississippi; attacker at large</title><description><![CDATA[Tragedy struck Leland, Mississippi, early Saturday as a shooting during homecoming weekend claimed four lives and injured at least twelve. Crowds gathered on the main street for the high school festivities when the violence erupted. Authorities are actively investigating the incident, with the Mississippi Bureau of Investigation assisting local efforts.]]></description><link>https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/world/us/us-school-campus-shooting-at-least-4-dead-12-injured-in-mississippi-attacker-at-large/articleshow/124482909.cms</link><guid>https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/world/us/us-school-campus-shooting-at-least-4-dead-12-injured-in-mississippi-attacker-at-large/articleshow/124482909.cms</guid><pubDate>Sat, 11 Oct 2025 21:11:18 +0530</pubDate><dc:creator>TOI WORLD DESK</dc:creator><enclosure type="image/jpeg" length="665151" url="https://static.toiimg.com/photo/msid-124484371,imgsize-665151.cms"/></item><item><title>'Mr PM, you are great': US ambassador-designate gifts Trump-signed portrait to PM Modi</title><description><![CDATA[]]></description><link>https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/india/mr-pm-you-are-great-us-ambassador-designate-gifts-trump-signed-portrait-to-pm-modi-see-pic/articleshow/124481431.cms</link><guid>https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/india/mr-pm-you-are-great-us-ambassador-designate-gifts-trump-signed-portrait-to-pm-modi-see-pic/articleshow/124481431.cms</guid><pubDate>Sat, 11 Oct 2025 20:05:41 +0530</pubDate><dc:creator>TOI NEWS DESK</dc:creator><enclosure type="image/jpeg" length="782655" url="https://static.toiimg.com/photo/msid-124481499,imgsize-782655.cms"/></item><item><title>IND vs WI: Jadeja faces difficult IND-AUS series axe query - 'Why didn't I get selected?'</title><description><![CDATA[Ravindra Jadeja has been excluded from the ODI squad for the Australia tour. This news emerged following concerns about his health during his presidential campaign.]]></description><link>https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/world/us/joe-bidens-cancer-battle-former-us-president-undergoing-treatment-spokesperson-confirms-radiation-hormone-therapy/articleshow/124484024.cms</link><guid>https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/world/us/joe-bidens-cancer-battle-former-us-president-undergoing-treatment-spokesperson-confirms-radiation-hormone-therapy/articleshow/124484024.cms</guid><pubDate>Sat, 11 Oct 2025 22:15:43 +0530</pubDate><dc:creator>TOI WORLD DESK</dc:creator><enclosure type="image/jpeg" length="474770" url="https://static.toiimg.com/photo/msid-124484515,imgsize-474770.cms"/></item><item><title>'Indians' success in US no conspiracy': Zoho's Sridhar Vembu</title><description><![CDATA[Zoho CEO Sridhar Vembu explains why Indian professionals dominate American technology leadership, attributing it to unintended consequences of the H-1B visa and green card system. The lengthy immigration process made job switching risky, creating committed long-term employees who naturally earned promotions. Vembu emphasises R&D success requires time-intensive commitment, not just funding. His comments come amid controversy over Trump's proposed $100,000 H-1B fee.]]></description><link>https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/technology/tech-news/zoho-founder-sridhar-vembu-dominance-of-indians-in-american-technology-companies-is-no-conspiracy-it-was-consequence-of/articleshow/124449788.cms</link><guid>https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/technology/tech-news/zoho-founder-sridhar-vembu-dominance-of-indians-in-american-technology-companies-is-no-conspiracy-it-was-consequence-of/articleshow/124449788.cms</guid><pubDate>Fri, 10 Oct 2025 14:56:19 +0530</pubDate><dc:creator>TOI TECH DESK</dc:creator><enclosure type="image/jpeg" length="48778" url="https://static.toiimg.com/photo/msid-124449835,imgsize-48778.cms"/></item><item><title>Taliban FM visits Darul Uloom Deoband. Explained</title><description><![CDATA[Taliban's foreign minister Amir Khan Muttaqi visited Darul Uloom Deoband, expressing optimism for improved India-Afghanistan ties and highlighting educational and cultural connections. They will stop Pakistan-based terrorists from infiltrating.  Intelligence indicates terror groups are regrouping.  The BSF is on high alert.  They will respond to any attempts to push terrorists into India.  Modern warfare technology is being used.  The BSF is training its personnel to counter enemy drones.]]></description><link>https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/india/fog-wont-help-terrorists-bsfs-winter-warning-to-pakistan-india-all-set-to-foil-infiltrations/articleshow/124478376.cms</link><guid>https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/india/fog-wont-help-terrorists-bsfs-winter-warning-to-pakistan-india-all-set-to-foil-infiltrations/articleshow/124478376.cms</guid><pubDate>Sat, 11 Oct 2025 17:52:35 +0530</pubDate><dc:creator>TOI NEWS DESK</dc:creator><enclosure type="image/jpeg" length="36804" url="https://static.toiimg.com/photo/msid-124478815,imgsize-36804.cms"/></item><item><title>2nd Test: Gill’s 129 powers India; Jadeja spins Windies into trouble</title><description><![CDATA[India's spinners have taken control of the second Test against the West Indies. Captain Shubman Gill scored an impressive century, setting a strong foundation. The West Indies are trailing significantly after losing four wickets. Ravindra Jadeja claimed three wickets, putting India in a commanding position to win the series. The Indian team displayed excellent batting and bowling throughout the day.]]></description><link>https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/sports/cricket/india-vs-west-indies/ind-vs-wi-2nd-test-shubman-gills-129-powers-india-ravindra-jadeja-spins-west-indies-into-trouble/articleshow/124477061.cms</link><guid>https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/sports/cricket/india-vs-west-indies/ind-vs-wi-2nd-test-shubman-gills-129-powers-india-ravindra-jadeja-spins-west-indies-into-trouble/articleshow/124477061.cms</guid><pubDate>Sat, 11 Oct 2025 17:05:52 +0530</pubDate><dc:creator>TOI SPORTS DESK</dc:creator><enclosure type="image/jpeg" length="136754" url="https://static.toiimg.com/photo/msid-124477138,imgsize-136754.cms"/></item><item><title>Paramilitary attack in Sudan: 53 killed, including children and women</title><description><![CDATA[]]></description><link>https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/world/rest-of-world/paramilitary-attack-in-sudan-53-killed-including-children-and-women-displaced-shelter-bombed-in-darfur-city/articleshow/124480360.cms</link><guid>https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/world/rest-of-world/paramilitary-attack-in-sudan-53-killed-including-children-and-women-displaced-shelter-bombed-in-darfur-city/articleshow/124480360.cms</guid><pubDate>Sat, 11 Oct 2025 19:20:07 +0530</pubDate><dc:creator>TOI WORLD DESK</dc:creator><enclosure type="image/jpeg" length="681357" url="https://static.toiimg.com/photo/msid-124480454,imgsize-681357.cms"/></item><item><title>'No matter how influential...' Haryana CM vows action in IPS 'suicide' case</title><description><![CDATA[Haryana CM assures strict action against anyone found guilty in IPS officer Y Puran Kumar's suicide probe, regardless of influence. The deceased officer's wife expressed dissatisfaction with the FIR, citing missing names and incomplete details, and requested corrections. She also alleged dilution of SC/ST Act charges and sought copies of crucial notes.]]></description><link>https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/india/haryana-ips-suicide-no-matter-how-influential-culprit-may-be-will-not-be-spared-says-cm-saini-assures-thorough-investigation/articleshow/124477820.cms</link><guid>https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/india/haryana-ips-suicide-no-matter-how-influential-culprit-may-be-will-not-be-spared-says-cm-saini-assures-thorough-investigation/articleshow/124477820.cms</guid><pubDate>Sat, 11 Oct 2025 18:05:46 +0530</pubDate><dc:creator>TOI NEWS DESK</dc:creator><enclosure type="image/jpeg" length="717009" url="https://static.toiimg.com/photo/msid-124478644,imgsize-717009.cms"/></item><item><title>Clashes rock Pakistan: Police fire on Gaza protesters - what we know so far</title><description><![CDATA[Hardline Islamist group Tehreek-i-Labbaik Pakistan (TLP) protests turned violent across Pakistan, resulting in at least 11 deaths and dozens injured. Demonstrators marched towards Islamabad in solidarity with Palestinians, clashing with police who used tear gas and barricades. The TLP, known for disruptive protests, faced government warnings against further marches.]]></description><link>https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/world/pakistan/anti-israel-protests-rock-pakistan-police-fire-on-gaza-protesters-what-we-know-so-far-about-violence-that-killed-11-in-3-days/articleshow/124474786.cms</link><guid>https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/world/pakistan/anti-israel-protests-rock-pakistan-police-fire-on-gaza-protesters-what-we-know-so-far-about-violence-that-killed-11-in-3-days/articleshow/124474786.cms</guid><pubDate>Sat, 11 Oct 2025 16:39:03 +0530</pubDate><dc:creator>TOI WORLD DESK</dc:creator><enclosure type="image/jpeg" length="4594835" url="https://static.toiimg.com/photo/msid-124476648,imgsize-4594835.cms"/></item><item><title>'PM not bigger than country': Owaisi's latest on Op Sindoor delegation— Watch</title><description><![CDATA[AIMIM chief Asaduddin Owaisi stated he joined the Operation Sindoor delegation for the country, not the Prime Minister, emphasizing national unity against terrorism. He highlighted India's stance against Pakistan-linked terror, sharing data on attacks. Separately, AIMIM plans to contest around 100 seats in Bihar's upcoming assembly elections, aiming to form a 'third alternative'.]]></description><link>https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/india/pm-not-bigger-than-country-owaisis-latest-on-op-sindoor-delegation-watch/articleshow/124477307.cms</link><guid>https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/india/pm-not-bigger-than-country-owaisis-latest-on-op-sindoor-delegation-watch/articleshow/124477307.cms</guid><pubDate>Sat, 11 Oct 2025 17:37:13 +0530</pubDate><dc:creator>TOI NEWS DESK</dc:creator><enclosure type="image/jpeg" length="38848" url="https://static.toiimg.com/photo/msid-124477448,imgsize-38848.cms"/></item><item><title>Indian states men prefer to work in: Gujarat leads; check top 10 here</title><description><![CDATA[The India Skills Report 2025 reveals rising employability among men, reaching 53.46% in 2025. Male professionals prefer working in Gujarat, Andhra Pradesh, Kerala, Maharashtra, Tamil Nadu, Delhi, Uttar Pradesh, Madhya Pradesh, Karnataka, and Haryana. These states offer career growth, infrastructure, and supportive ecosystems. Employers can use this insight for recruitment, while men can align career choices with high-opportunity regions.]]></description><link>https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/education/news/top-10-indian-states-men-prefer-to-work-in/articleshow/124472606.cms</link><guid>https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/education/news/top-10-indian-states-men-prefer-to-work-in/articleshow/124472606.cms</guid><pubDate>Sat, 11 Oct 2025 14:28:00 +0530</pubDate><dc:creator>TOI Education</dc:creator><enclosure type="image/jpeg" length="30342" url="https://static.toiimg.com/photo/msid-124472971,imgsize-30342.cms"/></item><item><title>NMC data shows India added just 21 doctors in a year when 80k graduated</title><description><![CDATA[India's doctor count appears stagnant, with the National Medical Commission (NMC) data showing minimal growth despite thousands graduating annually. Significant discrepancies exist between NMC figures and state medical council registrations, raising concerns about accurate healthcare planning and potentially misleading Parliament.]]></description><link>https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/india/nmc-data-shows-india-added-just-21-docs-in-a-year-when-80k-graduated/articleshow/124467765.cms</link><guid>https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/india/nmc-data-shows-india-added-just-21-docs-in-a-year-when-80k-graduated/articleshow/124467765.cms</guid><pubDate>Sat, 11 Oct 2025 03:53:04 +0530</pubDate><dc:creator>REMA NAGARAJAN</dc:creator><enclosure type="image/jpeg" length="679660" url="https://static.toiimg.com/photo/msid-124474259,imgsize-679660.cms"/></item><item><title>Barefoot & displaced, Palestinians return — What post-ceasefire Gaza looks like</title><description><![CDATA[Thousands of displaced Palestinians returned to Gaza's shattered north as a US-brokered ceasefire took effect, with Israeli troops beginning to withdraw. Families navigated rubble to reach ruined homes, marking a bittersweet return amid a new peace plan involving troop withdrawal and hostage swaps.]]></description><link>https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/world/middle-east/ceasefire-in-gaza-barefoot-and-displaced-palestinians-return-to-shattered-homes-israeli-troops-pull-back/articleshow/124475378.cms</link><guid>https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/world/middle-east/ceasefire-in-gaza-barefoot-and-displaced-palestinians-return-to-shattered-homes-israeli-troops-pull-back/articleshow/124475378.cms</guid><pubDate>Sat, 11 Oct 2025 16:13:22 +0530</pubDate><dc:creator>TOI WORLD DESK</dc:creator><enclosure type="image/jpeg" length="142944" url="https://static.toiimg.com/photo/msid-124475957,imgsize-142944.cms"/></item><item><title>Eight Indians, 10 firms face US sanctions over Iran oil link</title><description><![CDATA[America has sanctioned eight Indian individuals and ten companies. These actions are due to their involvement in trading Iranian oil. The US state department and treasury targeted numerous entities globally. Several Indian firms are accused of importing Iranian-origin petrochemicals and LPG. These shipments were destined for China and Pakistan. The sanctions highlight ongoing efforts to curb Iran's oil trade.]]></description><link>https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/india/eight-indians-10-firms-face-us-sanctions-over-iran-oil-link/articleshow/124466169.cms</link><guid>https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/india/eight-indians-10-firms-face-us-sanctions-over-iran-oil-link/articleshow/124466169.cms</guid><pubDate>Sat, 11 Oct 2025 02:27:23 +0530</pubDate><dc:creator>TNN</dc:creator><enclosure type="image/jpeg" length="1152059" url="https://static.toiimg.com/photo/msid-124466172,imgsize-1152059.cms"/></item><item><title>Amitabh Bachchan's secrets to staying healthy at 83: Sleep, cleandiet&more</title><description><![CDATA[Amitabh Bachchan, at 83, continues to inspire with his disciplined lifestyle. His routine emphasizes daily movement, including pranayama and stretches, alongside a clean, plant-based diet rich in Ayurvedic ingredients. Prioritizing eight to nine hours of sleep and maintaining an unwavering mindset are key to his robust health and longevity, offering valuable lessons for all.]]></description><link>https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/life-style/health-fitness/health-news/sleep-clean-diet-and-what-keeps-amitabh-bachchan-hale-and-hearty-at-83/articleshow/124475022.cms</link><guid>https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/life-style/health-fitness/health-news/sleep-clean-diet-and-what-keeps-amitabh-bachchan-hale-and-hearty-at-83/articleshow/124475022.cms</guid><pubDate>Sat, 11 Oct 2025 16:00:00 +0530</pubDate><dc:creator>TOI LIFESTYLE DESK</dc:creator><enclosure type="image/jpeg" length="1342224" url="https://static.toiimg.com/photo/msid-124474994,imgsize-1342224.cms"/></item><item><title>Gautam Gambhir's straight talk: 'I'll take all criticism for Shubman Gill'</title><description><![CDATA[Head coach Gautam Gambhir has pledged unwavering support for new ODI captain Shubman Gill, stating he's prepared to absorb all criticism to shield the young leader. Gambhir emphasized Gill's transparency and dedication, noting his "brilliant" start in leadership roles. The coach's commitment aims to foster Gill's growth and ensure team success.]]></description><link>https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/sports/cricket/india-vs-west-indies/gautam-gambhirs-straight-talk-ill-take-all-criticism-for-shubman-gill/articleshow/124475362.cms</link><guid>https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/sports/cricket/india-vs-west-indies/gautam-gambhirs-straight-talk-ill-take-all-criticism-for-shubman-gill/articleshow/124475362.cms</guid><pubDate>Sat, 11 Oct 2025 15:45:28 +0530</pubDate><dc:creator>TOI SPORTS DESK</dc:creator><enclosure type="image/jpeg" length="41952" url="https://static.toiimg.com/photo/msid-124475485,imgsize-41952.cms"/></item><item><title>Tejashwi new Rahul? Prashant Kishor says RJD leader could meet Amethi fate in Raghopur</title><description><![CDATA[Jan Suraj founder Prashant Kishor has challenged RJD leader Tejashwi Yadav, stating he would contest from Raghopur, a seat currently held by Yadav. Kishor predicted Yadav would lose the constituency, drawing a parallel to Rahul Gandhi's Amethi defeat. He alleged Raghopur lacks basic amenities despite being represented by Yadav and his parents.]]></description><link>https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/india/bihar-polls-tejashwi-new-rahul-prashant-kishor-says-rjd-leader-could-meet-amethi-fate-on-raghopur-seat/articleshow/124475819.cms</link><guid>https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/india/bihar-polls-tejashwi-new-rahul-prashant-kishor-says-rjd-leader-could-meet-amethi-fate-on-raghopur-seat/articleshow/124475819.cms</guid><pubDate>Sat, 11 Oct 2025 16:50:43 +0530</pubDate><dc:creator>TOI NEWS DESK</dc:creator><enclosure type="image/jpeg" length="35798" url="https://static.toiimg.com/photo/msid-124476948,imgsize-35798.cms"/></item><item><title>'Adult content': Akhilesh questions FB account suspension; claims post on journo, woman's death</title><description><![CDATA[Samajwadi Party chief Akhilesh Yadav's Facebook account, with over 8.5 million followers, was temporarily suspended, sparking accusations of silencing opposition voices. Yadav stated the suspension was due to posts about a journalist's murder and a woman's suspicious death, questioning pressure on media under the BJP. Union Minister Ashwini Vaishnaw denied government involvement, citing Facebook's policy on abusive content.]]></description><link>https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/india/adult-content-akhilesh-yadav-questions-facebook-account-suspension-claims-post-was-on-journalist-womans-death/articleshow/124474322.cms</link><guid>https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/india/adult-content-akhilesh-yadav-questions-facebook-account-suspension-claims-post-was-on-journalist-womans-death/articleshow/124474322.cms</guid><pubDate>Sat, 11 Oct 2025 15:18:08 +0530</pubDate><dc:creator>TOI NEWS DESK</dc:creator><enclosure type="image/jpeg" length="22912" url="https://static.toiimg.com/photo/msid-124474376,imgsize-22912.cms"/></item><item><title>Police brutality in MP: How party in 'parking lot' ended in tragedy for BTech student</title><description><![CDATA[A 21-year-old man, Udit Gayaki, died after allegedly being beaten by two on-duty constables while celebrating his graduation. The incident occurred after police reportedly demanded a bribe, leading to an assault.  An autopsy cited pancreatic hemorrhage as the cause of death, and the constables have been suspended.]]></description><link>https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/city/bhopal/cheers-to-tears-how-party-in-parking-lot-ended-in-tragedy-for-btech-student-a-police-brutality-in-mp/articleshow/124469241.cms</link><guid>https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/city/bhopal/cheers-to-tears-how-party-in-parking-lot-ended-in-tragedy-for-btech-student-a-police-brutality-in-mp/articleshow/124469241.cms</guid><pubDate>Sat, 11 Oct 2025 09:50:04 +0530</pubDate><dc:creator>TNN</dc:creator><enclosure type="image/jpeg" length="18616" url="https://static.toiimg.com/photo/msid-124469739,imgsize-18616.cms"/></item><item><title>LeBron, Savannah James praise A’ja Wilson after dominant 2025 WNBA Finals</title><description><![CDATA[A'ja Wilson dominated the 2025 WNBA Finals, leading the Las Vegas Aces to victory and securing her fourth consecutive MVP award. LeBron James and his wife Savannah celebrated her achievement on Instagram, expressing their admiration. Wilson previously embraced comparisons to LeBron James, highlighting her passion, fun, and unique journey in the league.]]></description><link>https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/sports/nba/top-stories/lebron-james-and-savannah-james-go-all-in-with-bold-shoutout-after-aja-wilsons-dominant-performance-during-2025-wnba-finals/articleshow/124477595.cms</link><guid>https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/sports/nba/top-stories/lebron-james-and-savannah-james-go-all-in-with-bold-shoutout-after-aja-wilsons-dominant-performance-during-2025-wnba-finals/articleshow/124477595.cms</guid><pubDate>Sat, 11 Oct 2025 17:27:17 +0530</pubDate><dc:creator>GLOBAL SPORTS DESK</dc:creator><enclosure type="image/jpeg" length="17590" url="https://static.toiimg.com/photo/msid-124477726,imgsize-17590.cms"/></item><item><title>Ground Boeing 787s, demands pilots’ body</title><description><![CDATA[An Air India Boeing 787 diverted to Dubai due to a technical snag, with its autopilot system failing. This follows another incident last week where a Dreamliner's ram air turbine deployed on approach. The Federation of Indian Pilots has urged the grounding of all B787s amid continuous electrical issues and called for a special audit of Air India's aircraft maintenance.]]></description><link>https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/india/delhi-bound-ai-dreamliner-diverts-to-dubai-fip-seeks-checks-on-b787s/articleshow/124457146.cms</link><guid>https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/india/delhi-bound-ai-dreamliner-diverts-to-dubai-fip-seeks-checks-on-b787s/articleshow/124457146.cms</guid><pubDate>Fri, 10 Oct 2025 20:14:53 +0530</pubDate><dc:creator>SAURABH SINHA</dc:creator><enclosure type="image/jpeg" length="21556" url="https://static.toiimg.com/photo/msid-124473004,imgsize-21556.cms"/></item><item><title>'Discussed India-US ties': Jaishankar meets ambassador-designate Sergio Gor</title><description><![CDATA[External Affairs Minister S Jaishankar met US Ambassador-designate Sergio Gor in New Delhi to discuss the growing strategic partnership between India and the United States. Gor's visit aims to familiarize himself with India following his Senate confirmation, with formal credential presentation to follow later.]]></description><link>https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/india/discussed-india-us-ties-eam-s-jaishankar-meets-ambassador-designate-sergio-gor-amid-tariff-tensions-wishes-him-best-for-his-role/articleshow/124474382.cms</link><guid>https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/india/discussed-india-us-ties-eam-s-jaishankar-meets-ambassador-designate-sergio-gor-amid-tariff-tensions-wishes-him-best-for-his-role/articleshow/124474382.cms</guid><pubDate>Sat, 11 Oct 2025 15:06:44 +0530</pubDate><dc:creator>TOI NEWS DESK</dc:creator><enclosure type="image/jpeg" length="928765" url="https://static.toiimg.com/photo/msid-124474614,imgsize-928765.cms"/></item><item><title>Visa chaos in Serbia: India’s Chessboxing hopes end; 'We just wanted to play'</title><description><![CDATA[11 Indian chessboxing athletes were forced to miss the World Championships in Serbia after their visas weren’t processed in time, despite applying weeks in advance. The contingent waited outside the Serbian embassy in vain as bureaucratic delays crushed months of preparation. The incident echoes past visa troubles that have cost Indian athletes key opportunities at global events.]]></description><link>https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/sports/more-sports/others/visa-chaos-in-serbia-ends-indias-chessboxing-hopes-before-they-began-we-just-wanted-to-play/articleshow/124473791.cms</link><guid>https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/sports/more-sports/others/visa-chaos-in-serbia-ends-indias-chessboxing-hopes-before-they-began-we-just-wanted-to-play/articleshow/124473791.cms</guid><pubDate>Sat, 11 Oct 2025 14:38:35 +0530</pubDate><dc:creator>TANUJ LAKHINA</dc:creator><enclosure type="image/jpeg" length="57716" url="https://static.toiimg.com/photo/msid-124473924,imgsize-57716.cms"/></item><item><title>Israel-Hamas ceasefire deal: US troops arrive in Tel Aviv to oversee truce</title><description><![CDATA[US troops are deploying to Israel to help manage a Gaza ceasefire, with a 200-member team set to establish a joint control center and coordinate aid. Meanwhile, thousands of displaced Palestinians are returning to devastated areas, facing lingering dangers and uncertainty about lasting peace following the conflict's initial phase.]]></description><link>https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/world/middle-east/israel-hamas-ceasefire-deal-us-troops-arrive-in-tel-aviv-to-oversee-truce-displaced-gazans-return-home/articleshow/124473410.cms</link><guid>https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/world/middle-east/israel-hamas-ceasefire-deal-us-troops-arrive-in-tel-aviv-to-oversee-truce-displaced-gazans-return-home/articleshow/124473410.cms</guid><pubDate>Sat, 11 Oct 2025 14:07:47 +0530</pubDate><dc:creator>TOI WORLD DESK</dc:creator><enclosure type="image/jpeg" length="959258" url="https://static.toiimg.com/photo/msid-124473425,imgsize-959258.cms"/></item><item><title>US hits China with 100% tariffs! Will it benefit India? Here’s what experts say</title><description><![CDATA[Indian exporters are poised to benefit from increased US tariffs on Chinese goods, potentially shifting demand towards India. Experts believe this escalation, with the US imposing a 100% additional tariff on Chinese imports, will create a level playing field and open significant export opportunities for India in the American market.]]></description><link>https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/business/india-business/us-hits-china-with-100-tariffs-will-it-benefit-india-heres-what-experts-say/articleshow/124474776.cms</link><guid>https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/business/india-business/us-hits-china-with-100-tariffs-will-it-benefit-india-heres-what-experts-say/articleshow/124474776.cms</guid><pubDate>Sat, 11 Oct 2025 15:16:34 +0530</pubDate><dc:creator>TOI BUSINESS DESK</dc:creator><enclosure type="image/jpeg" length="97532" url="https://static.toiimg.com/photo/msid-124474782,imgsize-97532.cms"/></item><item><title>'Shocking': Sonia writes to Haryana IPS widow; flags bias against social justice</title><description><![CDATA[Senior IPS officer Y. Puran Kumar died by suicide, naming 16 IAS and IPS officers in his note for alleged harassment. Sonia Gandhi expressed solidarity with his wife, highlighting the incident as a "grim reminder" of power's biased attitude. The Haryana government has initiated reshuffles in police leadership amid growing pressure.]]></description><link>https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/india/shocking-sonia-gandhi-writes-to-wife-of-dead-haryana-ips-flags-bias-against-social-justice/articleshow/124472528.cms</link><guid>https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/india/shocking-sonia-gandhi-writes-to-wife-of-dead-haryana-ips-flags-bias-against-social-justice/articleshow/124472528.cms</guid><pubDate>Sat, 11 Oct 2025 14:04:32 +0530</pubDate><dc:creator>TOI NEWS DESK</dc:creator><enclosure type="image/jpeg" length="41346" url="https://static.toiimg.com/photo/msid-124473378,imgsize-41346.cms"/></item></channel></rss>
